framework: Schelling focal point detection + physical observables
design: 两层观测: 物理层(状态)+ 焦点层(转折). History in geopulse.db

history.est: 3+ COORDINATED — IRGC THREATENS COMPLETE HORMUZ CLOSURE
history.note: Day 23→24. 🔴🔴🔴 P0 — IRGC ESCALATION THREAT + ULTIMATUM ACTIVE: (1) ★★★★★ IRGC says Hormuz will be 'COMPLETELY CLOSED' if Trump hits power plants (Guardian/CBS/Independent/CNN Mar 22) — BEYOND current partial blockade + selective transit. This is a NEW escalation threat; (2) ★★★★★ NSA Waltz REINFORCED Trump ultimatum (CNN) — WH policy not just Truth Social rhetoric. Deadline: Mon Mar 23 ~23:44 GMT; (3) CENTCOM Gen. Cooper: 8,000+ targets, 130 vessels destroyed = 'largest elimination of a navy since WWII' (Breitbart/CENTCOM Mar 22); (4) CENTCOM released new strike video — vehicles + aircraft in Iran (NDTV Mar 22); (5) IRGC 70 waves of True Promise 4 to date; (6) Dimona/Arad: 200+ wounded, 8 dead CONFIRMED multi-source; (7) Nuclear retaliation cycle (Natanz→Dimona) still active dynamic; (8) China appointed ME envoy (Ekhbary Mar 22) + China-Iran intel cooperation deepening (Small Wars Journal Mar 20); (9) Reuters Mar 22: oil prices set to rise further Monday on mutual energy infrastructure threats. PATTERN: IRGC escalation from 'selective transit' to 'COMPLETE CLOSURE' if trigger is pulled = war has another rung on the escalation ladder that hasn't been used yet. The 48-hour deadline is the SINGLE MOST BINARY decision point of the war.

Day 24. 🔴🔴🔴 ULTIMATUM D-DAY: (1) ★★★★★ Trump 48hr ultimatum RUNNING — deadline ~Mon Mar 23 23:44 GMT (Tue 07:44 Beijing). NSA Waltz reinforced on CNN = WH policy; (2) ★★★★★ IRGC: Hormuz COMPLETELY CLOSED if power plants hit (Guardian/CBS/CNN/Politico Mar 22-23); (3) ★★★★★ NEW ESCALATION: Iran now threatening DESALINATION PLANTS in Gulf states (Reuters Mar 22) — existential for desert populations; (4) ★★★★ Iran fired missiles at Israel early Mon Mar 23 (JPost: shrapnel from Iranian barrage Mar 23; Politico: missiles streak across sky over central Israel early Mon); (5) ★★★★ IDF spokesperson: war to continue "several more weeks" (ToI Mar 22); IDF chief: fight with Hezbollah "only just begun" (ToI); (6) ★★★ Fresh airstrikes on TEHRAN reported (TimesNow Mar 23 liveblog); (7) ★★★ CENTCOM: 8,000+ targets struck, 130 vessels destroyed = "largest elimination of navy since WWII"; (8) ★★ Araghchi: shipping not passing because of insurance, not Iran (ToI). PATTERN: War in BINARY MODE. Both sides firing while countdown runs. Iran early Monday missile barrage on Israel = demonstrating continued capability. Desalination threat = NEW escalation vector targeting WATER SUPPLY (existential for 60M+ Gulf residents).

history.est: 2-3 coordinated BUT DECLINING VOLUME — 1-2 at a time
history.note: Day 24. 🔴 CENTCOM Adm. Cooper: Iran fire declining — "beginning saw dozens of drones/missiles, now only 1-2 at a time" = QUANTITATIVE DEGRADATION. BUT: (1) IRGC claimed strikes on Prince Sultan Air Base (Saudi) + US Fifth Fleet Bahrain with missiles+drones (CNBC18/TimesNow Mar 23); (2) Israel launched "wide-scale wave" strikes on Tehran infrastructure (IDF/CNN/ABC AU/Moneycontrol Mar 23); (3) CENTCOM destroyed Qom Turbine Engine Production Plant (drone engine factory) on Mar 23 (ANI/ET); (4) CENTCOM Adm. Cooper: campaign "ahead or on plan" (Newsday Mar 23); (5) 8,000+ targets struck, 130 vessels destroyed; (6) Iran fired missiles at Israel overnight (cluster munitions on Petah Tikva, fire in Nir Am); (7) Fars/Mizan published TARGET LIST of Gulf power+desalination+UAE Barakah nuclear plant — INDIRECT THREAT; (8) Death toll: 1,500+ Iran, 1,000+ Lebanon, 15 Israel, 13 US. PATTERN: IRGC attack VOLUME declining (Cooper confirmed) but SCOPE expanding (Saudi air base, US 5th Fleet, Israel cities). Shifting from mass salvos to targeted precision strikes = capability degradation but not collapse.

Day 24 19:33. ★★★★★ REGIME SHIFT: Trump POSTPONED power plant strikes 5 DAYS after 'very good and productive' talks with Iran (Reuters/Guardian/AJE/CNBC ~19:15 CST). CENTCOM Adm. Cooper: fire declining from dozens to 1-2 at a time. BUT: IRGC struck Prince Sultan Air Base + US 5th Fleet; Israel wide-scale wave on Tehran; CENTCOM destroyed Qom drone factory; 8000+ targets, 130 vessels destroyed; Iran missiles at Israel (cluster munitions); Fars published target list of Gulf desalination+Barakah nuclear. US dead: 14. Iran dead: 3230+ (HRANA). PATTERN: Volume declining, scope expanding, Trump pivot = potential inflection. Sources: Reuters/Guardian/AJE/CNBC/CENTCOM/Newsday/ANI/HRANA

history.est: <2 mbd (3-4/day — IRGC THREATENS COMPLETE CLOSURE IF POWER PLANTS HIT)
history.note: Day 23→24. (1) ★★★★★ IRGC: Hormuz will be 'COMPLETELY CLOSED' if power plants hit (Guardian/CBS/Independent/CNN) — escalation from current partial blockade to TOTAL closure; (2) NYT Mar 20 remains latest transit data: avg 3-4 vessels/day (vs 130+ pre-crisis, ~97% reduction); (3) Iran selective transit now includes: China, India, Pakistan, Iraq, Malaysia, Japan; (4) 22-country coalition statement active; CENTCOM 'largest elimination of navy since WWII' — 130 vessels destroyed; (5) Japan open to minesweeping (Guardian Mar 22) — first mine-clearing offer; (6) Reuters Mar 22: oil set to rise Monday as US/Iran threaten energy infrastructure. ASSESSMENT: BINARY OUTCOME. If power plants struck: IRGC complete closure = transit drops from 3-4/day to ZERO + selective transit regime revoked. If ultimatum folds: current partial blockade persists. Either way, physical reopening remains weeks to months away. Japan minesweeping offer = first progress on critical gap but no deployment timeline.

history.est: <2 mbd (3-4/day — BINARY: COMPLETE CLOSURE vs CURRENT TRICKLE)
history.note: Day 24. (1) NYT Mar 20 remains latest transit data: avg 3-4 vessels/day (vs 130+ pre-crisis, ~97% reduction); (2) BBC Verify: ~100 ships since Mar 1 (~5/day avg); (3) ★★★★★ BINARY FORK: If power plants struck → IRGC "completely closed" = transit drops from 3-4/day to ZERO + selective transit revoked. If ultimatum folds → current trickle persists; (4) Iran selective transit: China/India/Pakistan/Iraq/Malaysia/Japan (Araghchi: insurance is the barrier, not Iran); (5) Japan open to minesweeping (Guardian Mar 22) — first mine-clearing offer but no deployment; (6) 22-country coalition statement active; (7) CENTCOM: 130 vessels destroyed, Hormuz radar/intel degraded; (8) ~2,000 ships + 20,000 seafarers stranded (IMO/NYT); (9) Mine threat STILL critical gap. ASSESSMENT: Transit in HOLDING PATTERN pending ultimatum resolution. Desalination plant threat adds NEW dimension — even if strait reopens, Gulf states may be non-functional if water infrastructure hit.

Day 24. NYT Mar 20 remains latest data: avg 3-4 vessels/day (vs 130+ pre-crisis, ~97% reduction). BBC Verify: ~100 ships since Mar 1. IRGC: COMPLETE CLOSURE if power plants hit (Guardian/CBS/CNN). Iran selective transit: China/India/Pakistan/Iraq/Malaysia/Japan. CENTCOM destroyed Hormuz radars + Qom drone factory. A-10s + UK bases active. USS Boxer 2+ weeks out. Mine threat still CRITICAL gap. Trump ultimatum deadline: Mon ~23:44 GMT. BINARY: execute → complete closure (0 transits), fold → current trickle persists.

history.est: <2 mbd (3-4 ships/day — 5-DAY WINDOW, COMPLETE CLOSURE PAUSED)
history.note: Day 24 19:33. Trump postponement REMOVES 'complete closure' trigger for 5 days. NYT Mar 20: 3-4 vessels/day (97% reduction). BBC: ~100 ships since Mar 1. Selective transit: CN/IN/PK/IQ/MY/JP. 2000+ ships stranded. Mine threat CRITICAL. USS Boxer 2+ weeks out. Japan offered minesweeping, no deploy. KEY: Power plant strikes paused = IRGC complete closure counter-threat PAUSED. Current trickle persists >=5 days. Sources: NYT/BBC/CNBC/Guardian/Reuters/CENTCOM/IMO

q3_spr_release_rate.label: SPR实际释放速率(mbd)
q3_spr_release_rate.delivery_timeline: 120 days per DOE, first barrels end of W3

history.est: D+8 — FIRST PHYSICAL BARRELS EXPECTED TODAY
history.note: SPR D+8. 🔴 PHYSICAL DELIVERY DAY: (1) Bloomberg: first US SPR barrels expected to hit market TODAY Mon Mar 23; (2) SPR still 415.4M bbl (EIA thru Mar 13) — ZERO physical drawdown confirmed in data; (3) DOE 45.2M bbl first batch contracts (BP, Gunvor) awarded; (4) OPIS: HALF of 172M bbl will be LOANED not sold; (5) Treasury 30-day sanctions waiver on ~140M bbl Iranian oil ACTIVE; (6) Gas: $3.94/gal national avg (USAToday Mar 22), up 30%+ in some states (NYT Mar 22). $2.98 pre-war. NBC: gas spending up 14% YoY; (7) LAST CLOSE: Brent $112.19 (WAR HIGH), WTI $98.32; (8) Reuters Mar 22: oil set to rise further Monday; (9) Goldman 'triple digits for years'; Citi $120/$150; Saudi $180; (10) JP Morgan cut S&P target to 7,200, downside 6,000. CRITICAL: TODAY is TRIPLE CONVERGENCE: (A) first SPR physical barrels, (B) Trump 48-hour ultimatum running, (C) markets reopen after weekend of nuclear retaliation + ultimatum + IRGC counter-threat. If power plants struck → IRGC complete Hormuz closure → Brent $130-150 → SPR irrelevant. If ultimatum folds → Brent may settle $108-115 on relief. SPR physical delivery at ~1.4 mbd avg is NOISE vs ultimatum binary.

history.est: D+8 — FIRST PHYSICAL BARRELS SHIPPED FRIDAY
history.note: SPR D+8. ★★★ ARGUS MEDIA CONFIRMED: First SPR shipments began FRIDAY Mar 21 (Argus Mar 21). DOE awarded contracts to 8 companies for 45.2M bbl from 3 storage sites (TX+LA). Recipients include Shell, Marathon Petroleum, BP. Deliveries scheduled Apr 1-May 31 with possible early deliveries. EXCHANGE CONTRACTS (loans): companies return 55M bbl (22% more than borrowed) — backwardation makes this work ( Apr vs  2028). Only 45.2M of 86M offered was subscribed (52%). Goldman raised 2026 Brent avg forecast to  (from ), Reuters Mar 23. Brent -112 Monday Asian. WTI ~ (tested ). S&P futures -0.4%. Gold ,609 (-0.7%). Gas .94/gal (+32% from .98 pre-war). CRITICAL: First physical barrels are flowing but at TRICKLE rate — 45.2M bbl over Apr-May = ~0.75 mbd, far below 4.4 mbd max. Structurally insufficient vs  Brent + Gulf production destruction.

history.est: D+8 — FIRST SHIPMENTS BEGAN FRI, ~0.75 mbd BATCH
history.note: Day 24 19:33. Argus confirmed: first SPR shipments Fri Mar 21. DOE 45.2M bbl to Shell/Marathon/BP/Gunvor (52% of 86M subscribed). EXCHANGE: return 55M bbl. Apr-May delivery = ~0.75 mbd. MARKET CRASH: Brent -8% to ~, WTI -8% to ~ on Trump postponement. IEA Birol: crisis worse than 1970s+Ukraine COMBINED. Gas .94/gal (+32%). Goldman raised Brent avg to +. 172M bbl coordinated with 32 countries. Sources: Argus/DOE/Bloomberg/CNBC/Goldman/IEA/NPR

fp1_china_action.label: 中国实质行动(唯一可行聚点注入)
fp1_china_action.findings: 🟡→🟢 CHINA DIPLOMATIC ACTIVITY UP: (1) Wang Yi met UAE envoy Mar 18; (2) China ME envoy appointed (Ekhbary Mar 22); (3) Beijing dispatched envoys+evacuating nationals (Wikipedia); (4) China-Iran intel cooperation deepening (SWJ Mar 20); (5) Joint China-Iran-Russia naval exercises backdrop; (6) CRITICAL: Trump 'productive conversations' with Iran MAY involve China back-channel — if so, fp1 is MATERIALIZING. Still below direct military/economic cost-action threshold but diplomatic velocity highest of war. Sources: Athens-Times/Wikipedia/SWJ/Ekhbary

fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.label: 美方信号包内部矛盾(承诺解锁前导)
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.findings: ★★★★★ MASSIVE REGIME SHIFT: 7-vector contradiction from 15:33 RESOLVED → COHERENT DE-ESCALATION. (1) 48hr ultimatum → 5-day postponement; (2) NSA Waltz reinforcement → reversed; (3) 'very good and productive conversations' → classic Trump deal framing; (4) 'complete and total resolution' language = face-saving activated; (5) Military operations CONTINUE (Qom factory, Tehran strikes) but energy infrastructure OFF-LIMITS; (6) CENTCOM 'largest navy elimination since WWII' = victory narrative ready; (7) IDF 'several more weeks' = Israel timeline diverging from US. PATTERN: Trump dealmaker archetype — escalate to max, then pivot to 'incredible deal'. 5 days is EXACTLY enough for Kushner/Witkoff framework. Sources: Reuters/Guardian/AJE/NYT/NBC/Politico

fp3_face_saving_framework.label: 面子工程原材料出现
fp3_face_saving_framework.findings: ★★★★★ FACE-SAVING FRAMEWORK MATERIALIZING: (1) Trump language: 'complete and total resolution' = desired end-state declared; (2) 5-day window = diplomatic space for terms; (3) Scaffolding: UNSC 2817 + 22-country coalition + Kushner/Witkoff + China envoy; (4) CENTCOM military victory narrative provides cover; (5) IRGC was offered face-save: power plants NOT struck despite ultimatum = Iran can claim deterrence worked; (6) Both sides have off-ramp material. CRITICAL QUESTION: What are the TERMS? Nuclear? Hormuz reopening? Proxy withdrawal? 5 days isn't enough for comprehensive deal — likely ceasefire-first, terms-later structure. Sources: Reuters/Guardian/AJE/NYT

fp4_cost_threshold.label: 成本阈值的物理逼近
fp4_cost_threshold.findings: 🔴🔴🔴 COST THRESHOLD = PRIMARY DRIVER OF PIVOT: (1) Gas .94/gal (+32% from .98); CA .70/gal; (2) BofA: gasoline spending +14% YoY; AP: bottom 10% spend 4% income on gas; (3) IEA Birol: crisis WORSE than 1970s oil shocks + Ukraine COMBINED; (4) S&P 4th weekly decline, JP Morgan cut target to 7200; (5) Gold -4% wiped 2026 gains; (6) US dead: 14 confirmed; Iran: 3230+ (HRANA); (7) War Powers: Congress dynamics unknown (search rate-limited); (8) MARKET REACTION TO POSTPONEMENT: Brent crashed -8% (→), WTI -8% (→), stocks surging = markets DESPERATE for de-escalation. The cost thesis is VALIDATED: domestic economic pain + market stress forced the pivot. Sources: NBC/BofA/AP/IEA/Goldman/JP Morgan/CNBC

noise_filter.rule: 按行为类型分类,不按人物分类
noise: 巴盖伊等发言人声明(言辞)
媒体'消息人士'报道(未验证)
signal: Trump签署行政令/军事命令(行动)
美军实际调兵/部署变化(行动)
IRGC实际攻击模式变化(行动)
中国实际经济/军事动作(行动)
noise_filter.key_distinction: 同一个人的言辞=噪声,行动=信号。Trump说'just for fun'=噪声。Trump命令打Kharg=信号。

pipeline_daily_checklist: 1. 物理层: 更新Q1(袭击频率) + Q2(通行量) + Q3(SPR释放)
2. 焦点层: 扫描fp1(中国动作) + fp2(美方矛盾) + fp3(退出框架) + fp4(成本阈值)
3. 噪声过滤: 新闻分类为action vs rhetoric
4. 结构性验证: 跑structural_verify检查盲区+停滞+链断裂
5. DAG更新: 只有物理层变化或焦点层信号触发才更新概率
